name: Hawkeye Breeders Service
services: Custom bull semen collection, freezing, storage, fertility testing, international export
notes: First US custom stud to ship semen internationally and the first approved for Australia and Europe; suitable for collecting privately-owned Dexter bulls.

name: ShowMe Genetic Services
services: Custom semen collection (CSS-certified for export), storage, shipping, embryo transfer, AI supplies
notes: Multi-breed; can collect and store Dexter bulls for export-eligible semen.

name: Cattle Visions
services: Multi-breed semen distribution/marketing, AI tech school
notes: Brokers and ships straws for many breeds, including niche/heritage.

name: Universal Semen Sales
notes: Maintains a dedicated Dexter breed section in its catalog.

name: Bovine Elite
services: International bovine semen marketing/brokerage, AI and embryo-transfer supplies, sire procurement

name: Genex Cooperative
services: USDA/APHIS export-approved semen collection, freezing, storage, distribution
notes: Large-scale collection center; absorbed several former custom-stud satellite sites.

name: ORIgen
services: Custom and stud semen collection, storage; TB- and Brucellosis-free certified facility
notes: Health status enables export-eligible collection and storage.

name: Champion Genetics
services: Custom bovine semen collection, reproductive services, supplies

name: SEK Genetics
services: Semen collection, freezing, storage, reproductive services

name: Gene Movers
services: DAFF-approved AI premise: import, export, storage and distribution of semen and embryos
notes: Australia's first Department of Agriculture-approved AI premise independent of a collection centre — relevant for importing/exporting Dexter genetics to and from Australia.
